overview: Aditya College of Engineering (ACEM), Madanapalle was established in 2009 by the Veda Educational Society in Valasapalle, Madanapalle, Annamayya District (formerly Chittoor District), Andhra Pradesh. Nestled near a scenic mountain range, the institution focuses on delivering career-oriented technical education to students in the Rayalaseema region, prioritizing professional excellence alongside rural empowerment and practical talent cultivation.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA). The college holds NAAC accreditation parameters.

nirfRanking.engineering: Not Ranked in Top 300 NIRF Categories

placements.highestSalary: ₹12.00 LPA (Peak tech stream individual selection highlights)
placements.highestDomestic: ₹5.00 LPA – ₹12.00 LPA core software development recruitment range
placements.totalOffers: 180+ seasonal recruitment offers across participating batches
placements.companiesVisited: 30 – 50 companies including regional off-campus pool drives

admissions.admissionProcess: Category A seats (70% standard convenience block) are distributed through AP EAPCET web counseling conducted annually by APSCHE. Category B institutional management quota admissions (30%) are allocated directly following minimum qualification parameters.
admissions.importantDates: The admissions cycle operates between June and September in line with state regulatory notifications.

campus.area: 10.25 acres beautifully nestled 10 km outside the heart of Madanapalle town
facilities: Central Library with abundant volumes and digital catalogs
Advanced Computing Centers and Electronics Labs
In-campus Secure Separate Hostels for Boys

campus.specialNote: The institution features extensive dedicated training windows from the third year onwards, covering aptitude, mock interviews, and group discussions to improve technical career placement readiness.
